stages.name: metadata / shape / dtype / range contract
stages.status_upgrade_policy: metadata-only evidence does not upgrade full inference

stages.name: TimeVAE full encode/decode alignment
stages.status_upgrade_policy: requires full encode/decode tensor or stats alignment

stages.name: runtime LoRA isolated alignment
stages.status_upgrade_policy: requires isolated formula/layer/module proof before integration

stages.name: tiny controlled full pipeline smoke
stages.status_upgrade_policy: tiny smoke is not production full inference

stages.name: experimental full inference CLI
stages.status_upgrade_policy: must be experimental entrypoint and must not replace guarded CLI
